title: Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises!
